# Content Brief: {{PROJECT_NAME}}

> Content-first. ALL text defined here before any HTML. CMS keys with fallbacks.
> Typography-as-design notes mark where text IS the visual, not just content.

---

## 1. Voice & Tone

- **Business name**: {{NAME}}
- **Industry**: {{SPECIFIC}}
- **Target audience**: {{WHO — demographics, expectations}}
- **Brand persona**: {{describe in 1 sentence — e.g., "confident expert who speaks simply"}}
- **Tone**: {{3 adjectives — e.g., "warm, precise, understated"}}
- **Never**: {{what the copy should NEVER be — e.g., "never salesy, never corporate jargon, never exclamation marks"}}

---

## 2. Hero Content

- **Headline**: {{SPECIFIC TEXT — max 5 words, creates visual impact}}
  - **Typography note**: {{how this text is designed — e.g., "at 8vw, 3 words per line, tight leading"}}
  - **Line breaks**: {{intentional breaks — e.g., "Design / With / Purpose" on 3 lines}}
- **Subheadline**: {{1 sentence, supports the headline}}
- **Primary CTA**: {{action verb + object — e.g., "Explore Projects" NOT "Learn More"}}
- **Secondary CTA**: {{optional — e.g., "Schedule a Call"}}
- **Eyebrow**: {{optional label above headline — e.g., "Architecture Studio" in small caps}}

---

## 3. About / Value Proposition

- **Manifesto text**: {{2-3 sentences at display size — the brand's declaration}}
  - **Typography note**: {{this is a typographic moment — large display text, not body copy}}
- **Origin story**: {{2-3 paragraphs — who, why, how}}
- **Differentiators**: {{3-5 unique selling points}}
  - 1. {{USP with short description}}
  - 2. {{USP}}
  - 3. {{USP}}
- **Stats / Evidence**: (if applicable)
  - {{Number}} + {{label}} (e.g., "150+ Projects Completed")
  - {{Number}} + {{label}}
  - {{Number}} + {{label}}

---

## 13. SEO Copy

### Per Page

| Page | Title Tag (< 60 chars) | Meta Description (< 155 chars) |
|------|----------------------|-------------------------------|
| Homepage | {{title}} | {{description}} |
| About | {{title}} | {{description}} |
| Services | {{title}} | {{description}} |
| Portfolio | {{title}} | {{description}} |
| Contact | {{title}} | {{description}} |

### Structured Data
- **Type**: {{Organization / LocalBusiness / ProfessionalService}}
- **JSON-LD fields**: name, url, logo, description, address, phone, social profiles

### OG Defaults
- **og:type**: website
- **og:image**: {{path to OG image — 1200x630}}
- **og:locale**: {{language}}

## 14. Typography-as-Design Notes

Mark sections where text IS the visual element (not just content delivery):

| Section | Text | Design Treatment |
|---------|------|-----------------|
| Hero headline | "{{text}}" | {{size, weight, leading, line breaks, animation}} |
| Manifesto | "{{text}}" | {{display size, scroll-scrub reveal, etc.}} |
| {{Section}} | "{{text}}" | {{how typography becomes visual architecture}} |

These notes feed into page-plans recipe cards and ensure `section-builder` treats text as design.
